title: MediaWiki i18n message file
description: Schema for MediaWiki extension internationalisation JSON files stored in the i18n/ directory.

@metadata.description: File metadata recognised by MediaWiki and TranslateWiki.

message-documentation.description: Language code of the message-documentation file (used in qqq.json).

last-author.description: Username of the most recent author.

additionalProperties.description: Each message key maps to a localised string value.
